target.title: CodexBar menu bar icon hangs and remains memory-heavy
target.body:
## Environment
- App: `/Applications/CodexBar.app`
- Version: `0.32.4` (`CFBundleVersion: 79`, `CodexGitCommit: edf3d8da`)
- Bundle ID: `com.steipete.codexbar`
- Machine: `/Users/dhruvanand/Library/...`
- Observed on: `2026-06-07`

## Summary
Opening the CodexBar menu bar icon hangs and leaves the app instance in an unhealthy state with elevated resident memory.

## Live process snapshot
Captured while the issue was happening:

```text
pid 27497 /Applications/CodexBar.app/Contents/MacOS/CodexBar
cputime: 2:33.83
elapsed: 03:42:45
%cpu: 0.0
%mem: 1.0
rss: 170944 KB (~167 MB)
```

Related Codex-related processes still running and active in the same session:

```text
pid 90556 /Users/dhruvanand/.codex/packages/standalone/current/codex
  cputime: 91:01.02
  %mem: 1.1
  rss: 181744 KB (~177 MB)
```

## Evidence from macOS logs
Recent logs for PID 27497 show repeated LocalAuthentication/Keychain security activity and connection churn:

```text
2026-06-07 04:43:23.789022+0530  CodexBar: (Security) SecItemCopyMatching
2026-06-07 04:43:23.789038+0530  CodexBar: (Security) SecItemCopyMatching_ios
2026-06-07 04:43:23.793249+0530  CodexBar: (libxpc.dylib) ... connection cancelled by xpc_connection_cancel()
2026-06-07 04:43:23.793638+0530  CodexBar: (LocalAuthentication) ... Creating LAContext new
...
2026-06-07 04:43:24.662160+0530  CodexBar: (CFNetwork) Task ... done using Connection 486
```

I only collected local runtime logs and process state, not external diagnostics. The app seems to be stuck while interacting with auth/keychain and keeps the instance alive with high baseline RSS.

## Steps observed
1. Open CodexBar from menu bar.
2. Click the CodexBar icon to open UI / account area.
3. UI appears to hang and/or become unresponsive; menu interaction takes long and process state remains high-memory.

## Expected
- Menu opens quickly and interaction remains responsive.
- Process RSS should remain stable at normal idle baseline.

## Notes
I can provide the full command output snippets if needed.
target.author: dhruv-anand-aintech
